choose a throne:

Event: Mermaid Adventure
Event Date: 11/06/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: E43
Water Bubble Engraving

Enhancement: 1
Once in a while the engraving owner gains a shield that blocks 120000 / 141100 / 201600 / 288000 / 384000 / 480000 / 600000 of any damage. The shield lasts up to 3 sec. When the shield runs out or gets destroyed, it explodes and deals 40000 / 58800 / 84000 / 120000 / 160000 / 200000 / 250000 physical damage to 2 nearby enemy units.

Enhancement: 2
50000 Health from the gems
Once in a while the engraving owner gains a shield that blocks 130000 / 188200 / 268800 / 384000 / 512000 / 640000 / 800000 of any damage. The shield lasts up to 4 sec. When the shield runs out or gets destroyed, it explodes and deals 50000 / 64700 / 92400 / 132000 / 176000 / 220000 / 275000 pure damage to 3 nearby enemy units. The engraving unit recovers health equal to 65% / 66% / 68% / 71% / 74% / 77% / 80% of the damage dealt by the ability.

Enhancement: 3
100000 Health from the gems
Once in a while the engraving owner gains a shield that blocks 200000 / 235200 / 336000 / 480000 / 640000 / 800000 / 1000000 of any damage. The shield lasts up to 5 sec. When the shield runs out or gets destroyed, it explodes and deals 60000 / 70600 / 100800 / 144000 / 192000 / 240000 / 300000 pure damage to all enemy units. This damage ignores shields and damage-reducing effects. The engraving unit recovers health equal to 85% / 86% / 88% / 91% / 94% / 97% / 100% of the damage
dealt by the ability.
